# Gautam Vhavle - Portfolio

> Full-Stack Developer, GenAI Engineer, and IoT Specialist

## About

Gautam Vhavle is a Full-Stack Developer and GenAI Engineer currently working at Siemens in Bengaluru, India. He is a patent holder specializing in building intelligent systems using modern web technologies, Generative AI, and IoT solutions.

## Contact

- Email: gautamvhavle@gmail.com
- Website: https://gautamvhavle.xyz
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

## Key Skills

- **Languages**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C++, Bash
- **Frontend**: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN
- **Backend**: FastAPI, Flask, Node.js
- **AI/ML**: LangChain, LangGraph, GenAI, Context Engineering
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MSSQL
- **IoT**: Raspberry Pi, Embedded Systems, Hardware Integration

## Experience

Currently working as a Full-Stack Developer and GenAI Engineer at Siemens, where he designs and implements AI-powered orchestration workflows using LangChain, LangGraph, and Vision models.

## Notable Achievements

- Patent holder in AI/IoT domain
- Built intelligent systems for industrial automation
- Developed AI-powered monitoring solutions using computer vision
- Created production-ready GenAI applications

## Social Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/gautamvhavle
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gautamvhavle

- Dev.to: https://dev.to/gautamvhavle

## Site Structure

- Home (/) - Portfolio homepage with intro, bio, tech stack, and featured projects
- About (/about) - Detailed background, journey, and personal story
- Blog (/blogs) - Technical articles and insights
- Apps (/apps) - Interactive web applications and projects
- Sitemap: https://gautamvhavle.xyz/sitemap.xml

## Purpose

This portfolio showcases Gautam's expertise in Full-Stack Development, Generative AI, and IoT engineering. It features his projects, blog posts, work experience, certifications, and ways to connect with him.
